headline: FIS’s Expanded Lending Suite and Fuse Alliance Could Be A Game Changer For Fidelity National Information Services (FIS)
summary: In recent weeks, Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has announced new lending and trading platforms, clinched core banking and origination partnerships, received top-tier risk technology rankings, and outlined a leadership transition with Chief Legal & Corporate Affairs Officer Caroline Tsai stepping down to an advisory role by September 1, 2026. Together, these developments highlight FIS’s push to deepen its role in core banking, commercial lending, and risk technology, while...

headline: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Forms Strategic Alliance With Fuse
summary: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE:FIS) is one of the 10 best payment processing stocks to buy now. On June 8, Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE:FIS) and Fuse entered into a strategic partnership, in an effort to offer indirect car and equipment lenders in the U.S. and Canada a cutting-edge, end-to-end origination platform.
